🎨 ABOUT THIS PRINT
This mesmerizing 3D Paper Cut Chinese Pagoda & Golden Moon artwork brings ancient Asian elegance to your walls. A multi-tiered red and gold pagoda sits atop a rocky cliff, dramatically backlit by a luminous full moon. Sculpted paper clouds, cascading waterfall, red plum blossom trees, and floating origami cranes complete this museum-quality paper sculpture art print.
